codeReview.summary: The reviewed commit only adds regression tests and does not implement the live CCXT ticker ingestion or route/service changes required by the feature. The underlying runtime already contains the exchange ticker ingestion path, and this commit merely characterizes it.

issues.description: The feature description requires implementing live CCXT ticker ingestion into the persisted exchange ticker path and ensuring `/exchanges/{id}` plus `/exchanges/{id}/tickers` expose live-backed behavior. Commit `4e19c70` modifies only tests and contains no production changes in `src/`, so the feature itself was not implemented in this commit.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `runtime-provider-worker` skill instructs workers to trace and prefer service-layer/runtime changes for provider coordination features, but this worker completed the feature with a test-only commit and no production/runtime edits even though the feature description is implementation-focused.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file `.factory/skills/runtime-provider-worker/SKILL.md` steps 2-4 require tracing `src/app.ts`, `src/services/market-runtime.ts`, `src/providers/ccxt.ts` and preferring service-layer fixes; commit `4e19c70` changes only `tests/exchange-fidelity.test.ts`, and the handoff claims the feature as implemented.

summary: Fail: the reviewed commit is test-only and does not implement the exchange live ticker ingestion feature. No blocking correctness bug was found in the already-present runtime path, but this feature assignment was not fulfilled by commit `4e19c70`.
